description: Write a design/research doc explaining whether pi-caffeinate would keep beadwork runs awake, identify the lifecycle phases it covers vs misses, and turn the assessment into implementation guidance for a native beadwork caffeinate feature epic.

comments.text: Added `docs/pi-caffeinate-with-beadwork.md` with a lifecycle assessment showing that `pi-caffeinate` only covers active delegated `pi` worker runtime, not parent-session polling, validation, landing/merge-back, cleanup, or reviewer gating (`--no-extensions`). The doc also proposes an epic shape and bead breakdown for a native beadwork keep-awake feature. Verification: `npm run test` and `npm run typecheck` passed. `npm run lint` completed successfully but surfaced a pre-existing Biome schema-version info message (`biome.json` schema 2.4.12 vs CLI 2.4.10).

title: Document pi-caffeinate fit for beadwork lifecycle
